mapper.sql: A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_NM, A.SUSER_TYPE_CD, A.DUSER_REG_DATE , A.SUSER_TEL_NO, A.SUSER_FAX_NO, A.SUSER_MPHON_NO , A.NLOGIN_FAIL_TMSCNT, A.SCHR_MSG_RCV_YN, A.SMPHON_OTTP_YN, A.SUSER_STTUS_CD , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID, A.SDIBEL_UCLS_USER_ID, A.SKT_TKCG_USER_ID, A.SUSER_RMARK , A.SOLD_USER_ID, A.SIPMS_CONN_YN , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , (CASE WHEN STRPOS( A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@') >4 THEN SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ))-2 ) || '***@' || SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) ELSE SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 )) ) || '*@' || SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) END ) AS SUSER_EMAIL_ADR

, B.SUSER_STTUS_NM AS SUSER_STTUS_NM , (CASE WHEN C.SUSER_GRADE_NM IS NULL THEN '조회자' ELSE C.SUSER_GRADE_NM END ) AS SUSER_GRADE_NM , D.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM , E.SUSER_NM AS SDIBEL_UCLS_USER_NM , F.SUSER_NM AS SKT_TKCG_USER_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM , NVL (G.SUSER_GRADE_CD , 'UR0006') AS SUSER_GRADE_CD , (CASE WHEN G.SUSER_GRADE_CD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS SIPMS_USER_YN
, A.SUSER_STTUS_NM , A.SUSER_GRADE_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM , A.SDIBEL_UCLS_USER_NM , A.SKT_TKCG_USER_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM , A.SUSER_GRADE_CD , A.SIPMS_USER_YN
, MST.TB_USER_STTUS_CD B , MST.TB_USER_GRADE_CD C , MST.TB_ORG_BAS D , MST.TB_USER_BAS E , MST.TB_USER_BAS F , (SELECT DISTINCT SUSER_ID, SUSER_GRADE_CD FROM MST.TB_USER_AUTH_TXN) G

AND A.SUSER_STTUS_CD = B.SUSER_STTUS_CD(+) AND A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = D.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.SDIBEL_UCLS_USER_ID = E.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SKT_TKCG_USER_ID = F.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SUSER_ID = G.SUSER_ID(+) AND G.SUSER_GRADE_CD = C.SUSER_GRADE_CD(+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_USER_BAS A
ORDER BY A.SUSER_NM ,D.SORG_NM ,A.SUSER_GRADE_CD

SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_USER_BAS A
SELECT A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR FROM MST.TB_USER_BAS A WHERE A.SUSER_ID = #{suserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
